title: elymus arenarius var. compositus
intro: Elymus arenarius var. compositus, also known as the sea couch grass, is a type of perennial grass native to coastal areas in Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elymus arenarius var. compositus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its roots can be used to make a medicinal extract, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
